items.original_text: RT Logan Kilpatrick Gemini 3.5 Flash has made huge progress from 3.1 Pro on GDPval, Flash is competing at the frontier, post training going strong :)
items.zh_text: 转发 Logan Kilpatrick：Gemini 3.5 Flash 在 GDPval 上相比 3.1 Pro 取得了巨大进步，Flash 正在前沿领域竞争，后训练进展强劲 :)

items.original_text: RT Varun Mohan Yesterday, we 3x’d limits on Antigravity and are seeing you build so much more. One thing we heard was people are worried about hitting their weekly limits after a couple work sessions. To give you more runway, we’re 3x’ing the weekly Gemini quotas AGAIN on all paid plans. We’ve also gone ahead and reset Gemini quotas on all paid plans. Don’t stop building!
items.zh_text: 转推 Varun Mohan：昨天，我们将 Antigravity 的限制提高了三倍，并看到你们在此基础上构建了更多内容。我们听到的一个担忧是，人们在几次工作会话后担心达到每周限制。为了给你们更多空间，我们再次将所有付费计划的 Gemini 每周配额提高三倍。此外，我们还重置了所有付费计划的 Gemini 配额。继续构建吧！

items.original_text: RT Google Gemini Gemini Omni is here, and we’ve been seeing amazing creations all week. Here are some standouts 👇
items.zh_text: 转推 Google Gemini：Gemini Omni 来了，我们整周都在见证令人惊叹的创作。以下是一些亮点 👇

items.original_text: Interesting. Adam Thierer: Niccolò Machiavelli writing on AI and data centers in 1532 😄
items.zh_text: 有趣。亚当·蒂尔：尼可罗·马基雅维利在1532年写关于人工智能和数据中心的内容😄

items.original_text: “God made men differ in strength, but Sam Colt made them equal. Likewise, God made men differ in intelligence, but Sam Altman made them equal.” Hmmm tomie: @captgouda24 The prostitute comment is quite apt. God made men differ in strength, but Sam Colt made them equal. Likewise, God made men differ in intelligence, but Sam Altman made them equal. We’re now competing on beauty. The concern is not if scaling has hit a wall. It’s if you have.
items.zh_text: “上帝造人时赋予了不同的力量，但塞缪尔·柯尔特让他们平等。同样，上帝造人时赋予了不同的智力，但山姆·奥特曼让他们平等。”嗯……托米：@captgouda24 关于妓女的评论相当贴切。上帝造人时赋予了不同的力量，但塞缪尔·柯尔特让他们平等。同样，上帝造人时赋予了不同的智力，但山姆·奥特曼让他们平等。我们现在在美貌上竞争。问题不在于规模扩张是否遇到了瓶颈，而在于你是否遇到了瓶颈。

items.original_text: Interesting. Andy Hall: My new piece: instead of banning AI in teaching, we need to create an army of citizens who've learned how to build their own personal evals measuring whether AI fits their values. A new kind of distributed system that holds AI accountable to each of us. This is what I've
items.zh_text: 有趣。安迪·霍尔：我的新文章：与其禁止在教学中使用人工智能，我们需要培养一支懂得如何构建个人评估体系的公民大军，来衡量人工智能是否符合他们的价值观。这是一种新型的分布式系统，让人工智能对我们每个人负责。这就是我所做的。

items.original_text: The new LLMs are running around in circles - Flash 3.5 is looping and is expensive - Opus 4.7 is a regression - GPT 5.5 xHigh kinda just gives up after some time I am using Flash 3, Sonnet 4.5 and Opus 4.6 now 😅
items.zh_text: 新的LLM们都在原地打转——Flash 3.5在循环且昂贵，Opus 4.7是退步，GPT 5.5 xHigh用一段时间后基本就放弃了。我现在用Flash 3、Sonnet 4.5和Opus 4.6 😅

items.original_text: General Purpose LLMs Will Lead Us To AGI 🚀 OpenAI's reasoning model just disproved an 80-year-old Erdős conjecture on unit distances—autonomously. Not a specialized math solver, just a general-purpose model diving into Golod-Shafarevich theory and connecting geometry to deep number theory in ways humans hadn't explored. First time AI has solved a prominent open problem in mathematics. Validated by Noga Alon, Melanie Wood, and Tim Gowers called it "a milestone in AI mathematics."
items.zh_text: 通用大语言模型将引领我们走向AGI 🚀 OpenAI的推理模型刚刚自主推翻了一个存在80年之久的埃尔德什单位距离猜想。它并非专门的数学求解器，只是一个通用模型，深入研究了Golod-Shafarevich理论，并以人类未曾探索的方式将几何与深层数论联系起来。这是人工智能首次解决数学领域一个著名的开放性问题。该成果已得到Noga Alon、Melanie Wood的验证，Tim Gowers称其为“AI数学的里程碑”。

items.original_text: Meta is a very weird company They will lay off 10000 people and in the next three months hire 10000 more 😲 Entire orgs are getting eliminated. Instead - keep the good people and just reassign them 🤷‍♀️
items.zh_text: Meta 是一家非常奇怪的公司。他们会裁掉 10000 人，然后在接下来的三个月里再招聘 10000 人 😲 整个组织都在被淘汰。与其这样——不如留住优秀的人，直接重新分配他们 🤷‍♀️

items.original_text: This will bring AI to 42% of the web. Every model, every provider, every modality (text, image, video, audio). Vercel Developers: The AI Gateway plugin for WordPress is here. Install it and any plugin using the WordPress AI Client can call text, image, and video models with one API key. https://vercel.com/changelog/vercel-ai-gateway-plugin-for-wordpress
items.zh_text: 这将把AI带到42%的网页。每个模型、每个提供商、每种模态（文本、图像、视频、音频）。Vercel开发者：WordPress的AI Gateway插件来了。安装它，任何使用WordPress AI Client的插件都可以通过一个API密钥调用文本、图像和视频模型。
items.media_note: 该动态可能包含 X 原生媒体，当前 RSS 未提供视频文件，请打开原帖观看。

items.original_text: Personal update: I've joined Anthropic. I think the next few years at the frontier of LLMs will be especially formative. I am very excited to join the team here and get back to R&D. I remain deeply passionate about education and plan to resume my work on it in time.
items.zh_text: 个人更新：我已加入Anthropic。我认为未来几年在大语言模型前沿领域将是特别具有塑造性的时期。我非常兴奋能加入这里的团队并重返研发工作。我仍然对教育充满热情，并计划适时恢复在这方面的努力。

items.original_text: Over the past few months, we've been holding dialogues with scholars, philosophers, clergy, and ethicists on the questions AI raises—starting with how good character forms. Read more about how we’re widening the conversation on frontier AI: https://www.anthropic.com/news/widening-conversation-ai
items.zh_text: 过去几个月里，我们一直在与学者、哲学家、神职人员和伦理学家就人工智能引发的问题进行对话——首先从良好品格如何形成开始。了解更多关于我们如何拓宽前沿人工智能对话的信息：https://www.anthropic.com/news/widening-conversation-ai

items.original_text: RT Tulsee Doshi (1/4) Gemini 3.5 Flash is in a league of it's own! ⚡️ It's the perfect combo of intelligence, speed, & cost. It's now my daily driver in both Spark & Antigravity! Watch 3.5 spawn subagents organize a set of marketing assets, rename them, and put them into folders
items.zh_text: 谷歌深度思维 转推 Tulsee Doshi (1/4) Gemini 3.5 Flash 独树一帜！⚡️ 它是智能、速度与成本的完美结合。现在它是我在 Spark 和 Antigravity 中的日常主力！观看 3.5 生成子代理整理一组营销素材、重命名它们并放入文件夹。

items.original_text: RT Google Cloud We’ve partnered closely with leading organizations across industries to validate the Gemini 3.5 series within their own environments. Take a look ↓
items.zh_text: 转 Google Cloud：我们与各行业的领先组织紧密合作，在他们的环境中验证了 Gemini 3.5 系列。请看下方 ↓

items.original_text: RT Google Flow Introducing your agent and the all-new Gemini Omni model in Google Flow. #GoogleIO ✨ Think of your agent as a creative partner. It reasons through complex tasks and helps you brainstorm, create, and edit, all while under your direction. ⚡ Gemini Omni is where Gemini’s intelligence meets our generative media models. Think of it as Nano Banana but for video. It is a major leap forward in world understanding, multimodality, and editing. Try all the latest Google Flow updates from I/O today at http://flow.google.
items.zh_text: Google DeepMind：转推 Google Flow 在 Google Flow 中介绍你的智能体与全新的 Gemini Omni 模型。#GoogleIO ✨ 将你的智能体视为创意伙伴。它能推理复杂任务，并在你的指导下帮助你头脑风暴、创作和编辑。⚡ Gemini Omni 是 Gemini 的智能与我们的生成式媒体模型的结合。可以将其视为视频领域的 Nano Banana。这是世界理解、多模态和编辑方面的一次重大飞跃。立即从 I/O 尝试 Google Flow 的所有最新更新，请访问 http://flow.google。

items.original_text: We’re shipping a CDN pricing model that “smooths over” traffic spikes and viral events. This allows us to remove stress and surprises, with uncompromising quality and network performance. Predictability without slow routes, degraded PoPs, or priority bandwidth tiers. Vercel Developers: Flat Rate CDN is in Limited Beta for Pro teams. You pay a fixed monthly fee for Vercel CDN usage, with no overages for viral spikes, unfiltered bots, or misconfigured routes. Join the waitlist ↓https://vercel.com/changelog/flat-rate-cdn-in-limited-beta
items.zh_text: 我们正在推出一款CDN定价模式，能够“平滑”流量高峰和病毒式传播事件。这让我们能够消除压力和意外，同时保持无妥协的质量和网络性能。可预测性，没有慢速路由、降级PoP或优先级带宽层级。Vercel开发者：Pro团队的固定费率CDN现已进入有限测试阶段。您为Vercel CDN使用支付固定月费，无需为病毒式传播峰值、未过滤的机器人或配置错误的路由支付额外费用。加入等待列表 ↓https://vercel.com/changelog/flat-rate-cdn-in-limited-beta

items.original_text: Claude Managed Agents 🤝 Vercel Sandbox https://vercel.com/kb/guide/run-claude-managed-agent-tools-with-vercel-sandbox Claude: Live from Code with Claude London: we're launching self-hosted sandboxes (public beta) and MCP tunnels (research preview) in Claude Managed Agents. Run agents inside your own perimeter, with your security controls applied by default.
items.zh_text: Claude托管代理 🤝 Vercel沙箱 https://vercel.com/kb/guide/run-claude-managed-agent-tools-with-vercel-sandbox Claude：来自Claude伦敦代码现场直播：我们正在Claude托管代理中推出自托管沙箱（公开测试版）和MCP隧道（研究预览版）。在您自己的边界内运行代理，默认应用您的安全控制。

items.original_text: Rho cut weekly meeting time by 90% with Perplexity Computer. Computer checks Slack, Notion, Jira, Figma, and Google Docs, then flags missing tasks and changes the team needs to see. 120 work hours saved during a 12-week project. Read the customer story: https://www.perplexity.ai/enterprise/customers/rho
items.zh_text: Rho 借助 Perplexity Computer 将每周会议时间减少了 90%。Computer 会检查 Slack、Notion、Jira、Figma 和 Google Docs，然后标记团队需要关注的遗漏任务和变更。在一个 12 周的项目中节省了 120 个工时。阅读客户案例：https://www.perplexity.ai/enterprise/customers/rho

items.original_text: Anthropic is acquiring @stainlessapi, an SDK and MCP server platform that has powered every Anthropic SDK since the earliest days of our API. Read more: https://www.anthropic.com/news/anthropic-acquires-stainless
items.zh_text: Anthropic 正在收购 @stainlessapi，这是一个 SDK 和 MCP 服务器平台，自我们 API 早期以来就一直为每个 Anthropic SDK 提供支持。了解更多：https://www.anthropic.com/news/anthropic-acquires-stainless

items.original_text: We've published a paper that explains our views on AI competition between the US and China. The US and democratic allies hold the lead in frontier AI today. Read more on what it’ll take to keep that lead: https://www.anthropic.com/research/2028-ai-leadership
items.zh_text: 我们发表了一篇论文，阐述了对中美AI竞争的看法。美国及其民主盟友目前在尖端AI领域保持领先。了解更多关于如何保持这一领先地位的内容：https://www.anthropic.com/research/2028-ai-leadership

items.original_text: RT David Weston (DWIZZZLE) http://cybergym.io just updated its leaderboard and MDASH is now #1 using a new multi-model approach. Huge credit to Taesoo Kim and the Autonomous Code Security team for pushing the frontier on AI-driven vulnerability discovery and defense https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/security/blog/2026/05/12/defense-at-ai-speed-microsofts-new-multi-model-agentic-security-system-tops-leading-industry-benchmark/
items.zh_text: Satya Nadella 转发了 David Weston (DWIZZZLE) 的推文：http://cybergym.io 刚刚更新了其排行榜，MDASH 凭借一种新的多模型方法跃居第一。高度赞扬 Taesoo Kim 和自主代码安全团队在推动人工智能驱动的漏洞发现与防御前沿方面所做的贡献 https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/security/blog/2026/05/12/defense-at-ai-speed-microsofts-new-multi-model-agentic-security-system-tops-leading-industry-benchmark/

items.original_text: Our new multi-model agentic security system brings together more than 100 specialized agents across frontier and custom models to find exploitable bugs, delivering top performance on the CyberGym benchmark. We used it ahead of Patch Tuesday to help find and fix 16 vulnerabilities. Today we’re announcing that customers can sign up to test it in private preview. https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/security/blog/2026/05/12/defense-at-ai-speed-microsofts-new-multi-model-agentic-security-system-tops-leading-industry-benchmark/?v=1
items.zh_text: 我们的新型多模型自主安全系统整合了超过100个专业代理，涵盖前沿模型和定制模型，用于发现可利用漏洞，在CyberGym基准测试中取得了顶尖性能。我们在补丁星期二之前使用该系统帮助发现并修复了16个漏洞。今天，我们宣布客户可以注册参与该系统的私人预览测试。

items.original_text: PayPal runs 74,000 weekly tasks in Perplexity Enterprise. Teams use it for model validation, channel performance, market trend research, competitive intelligence, and product analysis. Read the customer story: https://www.perplexity.ai/enterprise/customers/paypal
items.zh_text: PayPal 在 Perplexity Enterprise 上每周运行 74,000 个任务。团队将其用于模型验证、渠道表现、市场趋势研究、竞争情报和产品分析。阅读客户案例：https://www.perplexity.ai/enterprise/customers/paypal

items.original_text: This works really well btw, at the end of your query ask your LLM to "structure your response as HTML", then view the generated file in your browser. I've also had some success asking the LLM to present its output as slideshows, etc. More generally, imo audio is the human-preferred input to AIs but vision (images/animations/video) is the preferred output from them. Around a ~third of our brains are a massively parallel processor dedicated to vision, it is the 10-lane superhighway of information into brain. As AI improves, I think we'll see a progression that takes advantage: 1) raw text (hard/effortful to read) 2) markdown (bold, italic, headings, tables, a bit easier on the eyes) <-- current default 3) HTML (still procedural with underlying code, but a lot more flexibility on the graphics, layout, even interactivity) <-- early but forming new good default ...4,5,6,... n) interactive neural videos/simulations Imo the extrapolation (though the technology doesn't exist just yet) ends in some kind of interactive videos generated directly by a diffusion neural net. Many open questions as to how exact/procedural "Software 1.0" artifacts (e.g. interactive simulations) may be woven together with neural artifacts (diffusion grids), but generally something in the direction of the recently viral https://x.com/zan2434/status/2046982383430496444 There are also improvements necessary and pending at the input. Audio nor text nor video alone are not enough, e.g. I feel a need to point/gesture to things on the screen, similar to all the things you would do with a person physically next to you and your computer screen. TLDR The input/output mind meld between humans and AIs is ongoing and there is a lot of work to do and significant progress to be made, way before jumping all the way into neuralink-esque BCIs and all that. For what's worth exploring at the current stage, hot tip try ask for HTML. Thariq: http://x.com/i/article/2052796100608974848
items.zh_text: 顺便说一句，这个方法效果很好：在提问结束时，让你的大语言模型“以 HTML 格式组织回答”，然后在浏览器中查看生成的文件。我还曾成功让大语言模型以幻灯片等形式输出结果。更广泛地说，我认为音频是人类偏好的 AI 输入方式，而视觉（图像/动画/视频）则是偏好的输出方式。我们大脑中大约三分之一的部分是一个专门处理视觉的大规模并行处理器，它是信息进入大脑的 10 车道超级高速公路。随着 AI 的进步，我认为我们会看到一系列利用这一优势的演进：1) 纯文本（阅读起来费力/费劲）2) Markdown（粗体、斜体、标题、表格，对眼睛稍微友好一些）<-- 当前默认 3) HTML（仍然带有底层代码的程序化方式，但在图形、布局甚至交互性上灵活得多）<-- 早期但正在形成新的良好默认值 ...4,5,6,... n) 交互式神经视频/模拟。我认为，这种外推（尽管技术尚未存在）最终会走向由扩散神经网络直接生成的某种交互式视频。关于“软件 1.0”制品（例如交互式模拟）如何与神经制品（扩散网格）精确/程序化地交织在一起，还有许多悬而未决的问题，但总体方向类似于最近爆火的 https://x.com/zan2434/status/2046982383430496444。在输入方面，也有必要且待进行的改进。仅靠音频、文本或视频是不够的，例如，我觉得需要指向/手势操作屏幕上的内容，就像你与一个真人并肩坐在电脑屏幕前所做的一切。简而言之，人类与 AI 之间的输入/输出思维融合正在进行中，还有大量工作要做，并且需要取得重大进展，远在直接跳到 Neuralink 式的脑机接口等之前。在当前阶段值得探索的是，一个小窍门：尝试要求输出 HTML。Thariq: http://x.com/i/article/2052796100608974848

items.original_text: Excel has quietly been Turing complete for a long time. Nice to see it now edging toward "AI complete"—SGD, attention, next-token prediction… all in cells. Austin Henley: Excel Copilot one-shotted a tiny GPT-style language model for me inside a spreadsheet: embeddings, causal attention, weights trained with stochastic gradient descent, next-token prediction, and a live slider to watch it learn.
items.zh_text: Excel 早已悄然图灵完备。如今它正迈向“AI 完备”——随机梯度下降、注意力机制、下一词元预测……全在单元格中实现，令人欣喜。Austin Henley：Excel Copilot 在电子表格中为我一次性构建了一个微型的 GPT 风格语言模型：嵌入层、因果注意力、通过随机梯度下降训练的权重、下一词元预测，以及一个实时滑块来观察学习过程。

items.original_text: This is the the quote I've been citing a lot recently. kache: you can outsource your thinking but you cannot outsource your understanding
items.zh_text: 这是我最近经常引用的一句话。kache：你可以外包你的思考，但你不能外包你的理解。
